sentences.sentence: The most basic kind of conversation involves two people who are talking to each other.

structure.subject: The most basic kind of conversation
structure.object: two people who are talking to each other

sentences.sentence: Typically, one of them initiates it and they take turns talking about some common topic or set of topics.

semantic_roles.text_piece: common topic or set of topics

sentences.sentence: Maintaining the turn-taking and keeping to the topic at hand (or shifting topics in a permissible fashion) takes a certain amount of cooperation.

structure.subject: Maintaining the turn-taking and keeping to the topic at hand (or shifting topics in a permissible fashion)

sentences.sentence: And whatever other purposes a conversation may have for the participants, conversations generally serve the purpose of polite social interaction.

structure.subject: conversations
structure.object: the purpose of polite social interaction
